TEXT.citation: Gravius, Daniël. 1661. Het Heylige Evangelium Matthei en Johannis ofte Hagnau Ka D'llig Matiktik. Ka na sasoulat ti Mattheus, ti Johannes appa. Overgeset inde Formosaansche tale, voor de Inwoonders van Soulang, Mattau, Sinckan, Bacloan, Tavocan en Tevorang. Amsterdam: Michiel Hartogh.

S.FORM: Annata ni-ierroua ta ti A Jesus ninnim ki wæ'i tou ourou ki 'Ou-vavatoug-han ki Hali-dazu-'en tou Bethanien tov ǣ-i-a-kou-an ti Lazarus ka ni-ma-patei-ato kalahei, ka ni-pa-pat-timæu-en tyn ki ni-kapatei-an.

Annata ni-ierroua ta ti A Jesus ninnim ki wæ'i tou ourou ki 'Ou-vavatoug-han ki Hali-dazu-'en tou Bethanien tov ǣ-i-a-kou-an ti Lazarus ka ni-ma-patei-ato kalahei, ka ni-pa-pat-timæu-en tyn ki ni-kapatei-an.
S.TRANS: Jesus Dan quam ses Dagen boor het Pascha te Bethanien Daer Lazarus was Die ghestorben as ghewee st weeft welken hy opgeweckt hadde uyt Den dooden.
Then Jesus six days before the passover came to Bethany, where Lazarus was, which had been dead, whom he raised from the dead.
逾越節前六日，耶穌來到伯大尼，就是他叫拉撒路從死裏復活之處。

S.FORM: Ka ni-tmanang tyni-æn hynna ki hi-addou doung-an, ka pi-leileig-in ti Martha: ka ti Lazarus ta saät neini-æn ka i-tou lam tyni-æn mierraoung tou avok-kan.
Ka ni-tmanang tyni-æn hynna ki hi-addou doung-an, ka pi-leileig-in ti Martha: ka ti Lazarus ta saät neini-æn ka i-tou lam tyni-æn mierraoung tou avok-kan.
S.TRANS: Sy bereyden Hem Dan aldaer een abonemaal en Martha diende: ende Lazarus Was een ban De gene Die met hem aensaten
There they made him a supper; and Martha served: but Lazarus was one of them that sat at the table with him.
有人在那裏給耶穌預備筵席；馬大伺候，拉撒路也在那同耶穌坐席的人中。

S.FORM: Irou ka ni-ara ti Maria sa-sat ki tingting ki rapoul ka Nardus ka mangal, ka assi ni hourad, ni s'a la-ymmag-hin tyn ta rahpal ti Jesus, ka ni-rihkagh ki vouk-kugh tyn ki rahpal tyn, ka mouh-tmouk ta ait ki rapoul tou talagh k'anna.

Irou ka ni-ara ti Maria sasat ki tingting ki rapoul ka Nardus ka mangal, ka assi ni hourad, ni s'a la-ymmag-hin tyn ta rahpal ti Jesus, ka ni-rihkagh ki vouk-kugh tyn ki rahpal tyn, ka mouh-tmouk ta ait ki rapoul tou talagh k'anna.
S.TRANS: Maria Dan genomen hebbende een pont salbe ban onberbalschte seer bostelijcke Nardus heeft de boeten Jesu ghe salst ende met haren hayre sijne boeten afghedrooght en â€™t huys wiert berbult han Den reuck Der salbe.
Then took Mary a pound of ointment of spikenard, very costly, and anointed the feet of Jesus, and wiped his feet with her hair: and the house was filled with the odour of the ointment.
馬利亞就拿着一斤極貴的真哪噠香膏，抹耶穌的腳，又用自己頭髮去擦，屋裏就滿了膏的香氣。

S.FORM: Anna ta ni-k'ma ta saät ki Pahtatæutæu-han tyn, ti Judas ka ti Simon Iskariot, ka si-vanavana-ah tyni-æn.
Anna ta ni-k'ma ta saät ki Pahtatæutæu-han tyn, ti Judas ka ti Simon Iskariot, ka si-vanavana-ah tyni-æn.
S.TRANS: Soo seyde dan een ban sijne discipulen [namelijck] Judas Simonis Istariot Die Hem berroden soude
Then saith one of his disciples, Judas Iscariot, Simon's son, which should betray him,
有一個門徒，就是那將要賣耶穌的加略人猶大，

S.FORM: Kaumang ka assi papapei-la ta rapoul katta ki tourou kæ'æ-toug-han ki malyttouk ka ni-phæn ki anna ta malimouk?
Kaumang ka assi papapei-la ta rapoul katta ki tourou kæ'æ-toug-han ki malyttouk ka ni-phæn ki anna ta malimouk?
S.TRANS: Waerom en is dese salbe niet berkocht boor drie Hondert penningen ende den armen gegeben ?
Why was not this ointment sold for three hundred pence, and given to the poor?
說：「這香膏為甚麼不賣三十兩銀子賙濟窮人呢？」

S.FORM: Ni-pa-sousou-en tyn ta at-ta, assi alei ka pæh-kbo-in tyn ta malimouk, ra alei-appa ka ta-ma-haouzong ta teni, ka akou pautti mei-koua ki atta ka pou-kou-an-ato.
Ni-pa-sousou-en tyn ta at-ta, assi alei ka pæh-kbo-in tyn ta malimouk, ra alei-appa ka ta-ma-haouzong ta teni, ka akou pautti mei-koua ki atta ka pou-kou-an-ato.
S.TRANS: Ende Dit seyde hy niet om dat hy besorght was boor Den armen maer oam dat hy een dief was ende hadde de beurse ende broegh het gene gegeben wiert.
This he said, not that he cared for the poor; but because he was a thief, and had the bag, and bare what was put therein.
他說這話，並不是掛念窮人，乃因他是個賊，又帶着錢囊，常取其中所存的。

S.FORM: Annata ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus, Pa-syk kounoung-au ta teni: Ni-haä tyn ta atta tou wæ'i ki ravak-kei jau-an.
Annata ni-k'ma ta ti Jesus, Pa-syk kounoung-au ta teni: Ni-haä tyn ta atta tou wæ'i ki ravak-kei jau-an.
S.TRANS: Jesus Dan seyde Laet af ban haer: Sy Heeft Dit bewaert tegen den dagh mijner begrabenisse.
Then said Jesus, Let her alone: against the day of my burying hath she kept this.
耶穌說：「由她吧！她是為我安葬之日存留的。

S.FORM: Ka i-tou-kakoua ymou-mi-æn ta malimouk, ra a'ou-si-ah-kamou myh kakoua jau-an.
Ka i-tou-kakoua ymou-mi-æn ta malimouk, ra a'ou-si-ah-kamou myh kakoua jau-an.
S.TRANS: Want Want De arme hebt ghylieden altijdt metu maer my en hebt ghy niet altijdt.
For the poor always ye have with you; but me ye have not always.
因為常有窮人和你們同在，只是你們不常有我。」

S.FORM: Ka makoilalaulau ka ma-batoung ki JOden ta mou-mha ki æ-i-akouan tyn hynna : ka ni-ier-roua assi dyk aleiti Jesus-an, alei-appa ka kmytta-ah ta neni ti Lazarus-an, ka ni-papattimæuæh-en tyn ki ni-kapatei-an.

Ka makoilalaulau ka mabatoung ki JOden ta mou-mha ki æ-i-akouan tyn hynna : ka ni-ier-roua assi dyk aleiti Jesus-an, alei-appa ka kmytta-ah ta neni ti Lazarus-an, ka ni-papattimæuæh-en tyn ki ni-kapatei-an.
S.TRANS: Een groote schaee Dan Der Joden berstomt Dat hy aldaer was : en quamen niet alleen om Jesus wille maer op Dat sy oock Lazarum souden sien Dien hy uyt Den dooDen opgeweckt hadde.
Much people of the Jews therefore knew that he was there: and they came not for Jesus' sake only, but that they might see Lazarus also, whom he had raised from the dead.
有許多猶太人知道耶穌在那裏，就來了，不但是為耶穌的緣故，也是要看他從死裏所復活的拉撒路。

S.FORM: Ka ni-matt'i-saal mat-tæ'i-kyppou ki sou ta Tama-P'ghik ka Si-bavau ka pakapa-tei-al-appata neni ti Lazarus-an.
Ka ni-matt'i-saal mat-tæ'i-kyppou ki sou ta Tama-P'ghik ka Si-bavau ka pakapa-tei-al-appata neni ti Lazarus-an.
S.TRANS: Ende De Ober-priesters beraedt-slaeghden Dat syoock Lazarum dooden souden.
But the chief priests consulted that they might put Lazarus also to death;
但祭司長商議連拉撒路也要殺了；

S.FORM: Ka mabatoung ki Joden ta ni-d'marang mou-koua alei ty-ni-æn, ka ni-tna-'msing [appa] ti Jesus-an.
Ka mabatoung ki Joden ta ni-d'marang mou-koua alei ty-ni-æn, ka ni-tna-'msing [appa] ti Jesus-an.
S.TRANS: Want bele Ban JoDen gingen henen om sijnen â€™t wille ende geloofden in Jesum.
Because that by reason of him many of the Jews went away, and believed on Jesus.
因有好些猶太人為拉撒路的緣故，回去信了耶穌。 （太21‧1－11；可11‧1－11；路19‧28－40）

S.FORM: Tou sasat ki wæ'i ka tou ææugh makoi-lalaulau ka maba-toung ka ierrou-sto touOu-vava-toug-han, dou millingigh ka sah-ka kouan tiJesus mou-]erusalem,
Tou sasat ki wæ'i ka tou ææugh makoi-lalaulau ka maba-toung ka ierrou-sto touOu-vava-toug-han, dou millingigh ka sah-ka kouan tiJesus mou]erusalem,
S.TRANS: Des anderen daeghs een groote schare Die tot Het eeft gekomen was hoorenDe Dat Jesus na Jerusalem quam
On the next day much people that were come to the feast, when they heard that Jesus was coming to Jerusalem,
第二天，有許多上來過節的人聽見耶穌將到耶路撒冷，

S.FORM: Ni-ara nein ta pehil ki pærænnæh ka Palm, ka ni-tppæ-næh dmoumma doumma tyni-n ni-makou-langægh, Hosanna, pakariang-auh ta teni loumou-lough ka ierroua tou Nanang ki MEIRANG ka Mei-sasou ka Si-bavau tou Israel.

Ni-ara nein ta pehil ki pærænnæh ka Palm, ka ni-tppæ-næh dmoumma doumma tyni-n ni-makou-langægh, Hosanna, pakariang-auh ta teni loumou-lough ka ierroua tou Nanang ki MEIRANG ka Mei-sasou ka Si-bavau tou Israel.
S.TRANS: Namen De tacken ban palm-boomen ende gingen uyt hem te gemoete ende riepen Hofanna gezegent [is] hy Die komt in den Name des Heeren [ hy die is ] De Koningh Israels.
Took branches of palm trees, and went forth to meet him, and cried, Hosanna: Blessed is the King of Israel that cometh in the name of the Lord.
就拿着棕樹枝出去迎接他，喊着說：

S.FORM: Ka ni-kabalei ti Jesus ta patak ki louang ka hasiva [ ka ezel],ka ni-i-tou-'a vantyn ki an-na, mama ki na sasoulat,
Ka ni-kabalei ti Jesus ta patak ki louang ka hasiva [ ka ezel],ka ni-i-tou-'a vantyn ki an-na, mama ki na sasoulat,
S.TRANS: Ende Jesus bondt eenen jongen ezel ende sat Daer op : geliick geschreben is
And Jesus, when he had found a young ass, sat thereon; as it is written,
耶穌得了一個驢駒，就騎上，如經上所記的說：

S.FORM: Ynna mahttakout Tati-mi-en ki Sion: kytt-ei, ierrarou-roua ta Mei-sasou ka Si-bavau ymhou-an i tou-ava'-tou patak ki louang ka 'yppou ka haäva.
Ynna mahttakout Tati-mi-en ki Sion: kyttei, ierrarou-roua ta Mei-sasou ka Si-bavau ymhou-an i tou-ava'-tou patak ki louang ka 'yppou ka haäva.
S.TRANS: En En breest niet ghy dochter Sion : siet uw' koningh komt sittende op Het beulen eener ezelinne.
Fear not, daughter of Sion: behold, thy King cometh, sitting on an ass's colt.
錫安的民哪，不要懼怕！

S.FORM: Ra assi 'ou-mhg-an ta at-ta ki Pahtatæutæu-han tyn tou naunamou: irou-ra ni-pou-va-vau-en ki kidi ta ti Jesus, annata ni-hybbalei nein ka ni-soullat-ten ta mææ-koua tyni-æn, ka ni-pam't-appa nein ta atta ty-ni-æn.

Ra assi 'ou-mhg-an ta at-ta ki Pahtatæutæu-han tyn tou naunamou: irou-ra ni-pou-va-vau-en ki kidi ta ti Jesus, annata ni-hybbalei nein ka ni-soullat-ten ta mææ-koua tyni-æn, ka ni-pam't-appa nein ta atta ty-ni-æn.
S.TRANS: Doch dit en berstonDen sijne Discipulen in Het eerste niet : maer als Jesus berheerlickt was doe wierDen sy ind achtigh Dat Dit ban hem geschreben was ende [dat] sy hem dit gedaen hadden.
These things understood not his disciples at the first: but when Jesus was glorified, then remembered they that these things were written of him, and that they had done these things unto him.
這些事門徒起先不明白，等到耶穌得了榮耀以後才想起這話是指着他寫的，並且眾人果然向他這樣行了。

S.FORM: Ka makoilalaulau kanna ka na lam tyn ta ni-gmail ki ni-tætææm tyn ti Lazarus pa-'æu-pænæh tou ravak, ka ni-pa-pattimæuæh tyn tyni-æn ki ni-kapatei-an.
Ka makoilalaulau kanna ka na lam tyn ta ni-gmail ki ni-tætææm tyn ti Lazarus pa-'æu-pænæh tou ravak, ka ni-pa-pattimæuæh tyn tyni-æn ki ni-kapatei-an.
S.TRANS: De schare Dan Die Met hem was ghetuyghde Dat hy Lazariun uyt Het graf geroepen ende hem uyt Den dooden opgeweckt hadde.
The people therefore that was with him when he called Lazarus out of his grave, and raised him from the dead, bare record.
當耶穌呼喚拉撒路，叫他從死復活出墳墓的時候，同耶穌在那裏的眾人就作見證。

S.FORM: Alei ki anna ni-dmoum-madoumma-appa tyni-æn ta ma-koilalaulau, alei ka ni-illing-'hgen nein ka ni-pam't-ten tyn ta ni-pou-kidi-en katta.
Alei ki anna ni-dmoum-madoumma-appa tyni-æn ta ma-koilalaulau, alei ka ni-illing-'hgen nein ka ni-pam't-ten tyn ta ni-pou-kidi-en katta.
S.TRANS: Daerom gingh oock De schare Hem te gemoete obermits sy ghehoort hadde Dat hy Dat teecken ghedaen hadde.
For this cause the people also met him, for that they heard that he had done this miracle.
眾人因聽見耶穌行了這神蹟，就去迎接他。

S.FORM: Annata ni-mattæ'i ta-væ-tavæh ta Fariseen, Kytta'n-noumi kauwa ka assei-moumi pouthanin? kytt-'ei, smala-dyllough tyni-æn ta ymmid ki næi.
Annata ni-mattæ'i ta-væ-tavæh ta Fariseen, Kytta'n-noumi kauwa ka assei-moumi pouthanin? kytt'ei, smala-dyllough tyni-æn ta ymmid ki næi.
S.TRANS: De Phariseen Dan seyden onder malkanderen Siet ghy [wel] Dat ghy gantisch niet en bordert ? siet De [geheele] wereldt gaet hem na.
The Pharisees therefore said among themselves, Perceive ye how ye prevail nothing? behold, the world is gone after him.
法利賽人彼此說：「看哪，你們是徒勞無益，世人都隨從他去了。」

S.FORM: Ka akoume'-âto hynna ta rarouma ki Griekken ka na taou k'anna ka ni-sabavau ki deip-eih nein tou'Ou-vavatoug-han.
Ka akoume'-âto hynna ta rarouma ki Griekken ka na taou k'anna ka ni-sabavau ki deip-eih nein tou'Ou-vavatoug-han.
S.TRANS: Ende daer waren sommige Griecken uyt de gene die opgekomen waren op Dat sy op't Feest souden aenbiddent.
And there were certain Greeks among them that came up to worship at the feast:
那時，上來過節禮拜的人中，有幾個希臘人。

S.FORM: Neni ta ni-mou-koua Filippus-an ka makka Bethzai-da ka tou Galilæa, ni-tmoumi-mia tyni-æn, koun, Meirang, mamoei-kame kmytta tiJesus-an.
Neni ta ni-mou-koua Filippus-an ka makka Bethzai-da ka tou Galilæa, ni-tmoumimia tyni-æn, koun, Meirang, mamoei-kame kmytta tiJesus-an.
S.TRANS: DeDese ban gingen tot Philippum die Ban Bethsaida in Galilea was ende baden hem seggende Heere wy wilden Jesum [wel] dien.
The same came therefore to Philip, which was of Bethsaida of Galilee, and desired him, saying, Sir, we would see Jesus.
他們來見加利利、伯賽大的腓力，求他說：「先生，我們願意見耶穌。」

S.FORM: Ni-mou-koua ta ti Filip-pus vannavanna ti Andreas-an: ti Andreas ti Filippus-appa ta nivannavanna kiatta ti Jefus-an.
Ni-mou-koua ta ti Filip-pus vannavanna ti Andreas-an: ti Andreas ti Filippus-appa ta nivannavanna kiatta ti Jefus-an.
S.TRANS: Philippus quam enDe seyde Het Andree : ende Andreas ende Philippus weDerom seyden het Jesu.
Philip cometh and telleth Andrew: and again Andrew and Philip tell Jesus.
腓力去告訴安得烈，安得烈同腓力去告訴耶穌。

S.FORM: Ra ti Jesuss ta ni-mat-tæ'i-v'lli neini-æn, k'ma, Ier-rou-ato ta kidi ki talei ka pou-vavau'eih kikidi ta Alak ki kaæu-loung.
Ra ti Jesuss ta ni-mattæ'i-v'lli neini-æn, k'ma, Ier-rou-ato ta kidi ki talei ka pou-vavau'eih kikidi ta Alak ki kaæu-loung.
S.TRANS: Maer Jesus antwoordde haer seggende De uyre ig gekomen Dat De Sone Des menschen sal becheerlicht worden.
And Jesus answered them, saying, The hour is come, that the Son of man should be glorified.
耶穌說：「人子得榮耀的時候到了。

S.FORM: Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou, Heirou assi t'koua tou næi mapatei ta vyttourough ki sifvh myhkakoua tou saiit ta anna, irou ra mapatei makka-ta pang ta anna makka-voua.
Missing, missing koun-nau-kamou, Heirou assi t'koua tou næi mapatei ta vyttourough ki sifvh myhkakoua tou saiit ta anna, irou ra mapatei makka-ta pang ta anna makka-voua.
S.TRANS: Doorwaer : boorwaer segge ick u Indien het tarwen-graen in de aerde niet en balt ende sterft soo bijft het selbe alleen maer indien het sterft soo brenght het beel brucht boort.
Verily, verily, I say unto you, Except a corn of wheat fall into the ground and die, it abideth alone: but if it die, it bringeth forth much fruit.
我實實在在地告訴你們，一粒麥子不落在地裏死了，仍舊是一粒，若是死了，就結出許多子粒來。

S.FORM: Timamang tamæv'an-go ki kæuæ-han tyn patau-rum-ma-ah ki anna: ti mamang-appa mavahier ki k'uag-han tyn tou næi katta, mahaa-ah kianna tou kuag-han ka myhkakoua myd-darynnough.
Timamang tamæv'an-go ki kæuæ-han tyn patau-rum-ma-ah ki anna: ti mamang-appa mavahier ki k'uag-han tyn tou næi katta, mahaa-ah kianna tou kuag-han ka myhkakoua myd-darynnough.
S.TRANS: Die sijn leben lief heeft sal het selbe berliesen : en die sijn leben haet in dewawereldt sal het selbe bewaten tof Het eeuwige leben.
He that loveth his life shall lose it; and he that hateth his life in this world shall keep it unto life eternal.
愛惜自己生命的，就失喪生命；在這世上恨惡自己生命的，就要保守生命到永生。

S.FORM: Heirou ti mamang ta 'mi-rong jau-an,smaladiloug-s jau-an ka toumamangta æ-i-a-koua-en-nau, æ-i-a-kou-al-appa hynna ta tama-'irong jau-an.Ka ti mamang ta' mirong jau-an teni ta 'illig-hau ki Rama
Heirou ti mamang ta 'mi-rong jau-an,smaladiloug-s jau-an ka toumamangta æ-i-a-koua-en-nau, æ-i-a-kou-al-appa hynna ta tama-'irong jau-an.Ka ti mamang ta' mirong jau-an teni ta 'illig-hau ki Rama
S.TRANS: Soo yemandt my Dient Die bolghe my : ende daer ick ben aldaer sal oock mijn dienaer zijn. Ende soo yemand my dient de Dader sal hem eeren.
If any man serve me, let him follow me; and where I am, there shall also my servant be: if any man serve me, him will my Father honour.
若有人服事我，就當跟從我；我在哪裏，服事我的人也要在那裏；若有人服事我，我父必尊重他。」

S.FORM: Hnyn mieringau ta vatti-au ki voulas: ka mang ta sou-a-mau? Rama, hami-ei-koh tou ki-di ki tæ'læi k'atta. Ra alei-appa ki anna ierou-ato-koh tou kidi ki tæ'lei katta.
Hnyn mieringau ta vatti-au ki voulas: ka mang ta sou-a-mau? Rama, hami-ei-koh tou ki-di ki tæ'læi k'atta. Ra alei-appa ki anna ierou-ato-koh tou kidi ki tæ'lei katta.
S.TRANS: Nu Nu is mijne ziele ontroert : ende wat wat ick seggen : Dader berloft my uyt dese uypre. Maer hierom ben ick in dese uyre gekomen.
Now is my soul troubled; and what shall I say? Father, save me from this hour: but for this cause came I unto this hour.
「我現在心裏憂愁，我說甚麼才好呢？父啊，救我脫離這時候；但我原是為這時候來的。

S.FORM: Rama pou-vavau-ei ki kidi ta Nanang oho. Annata ni-ieroua ta yngau makka toun-noun ki vullum, [koun], Ni-pou-vavau-en-nau ki kidi ka mi-la-ah-koh pou-vavau ki kidi [ty-ni-æn.
Rama pou-vavau-ei ki kidi ta Nanang oho. Annata ni-ieroua ta yngau makka toun-noun ki vullum, [koun], Ni-pou-vavau-en-nau ki kidi ka mi-la-ah-koh pou-vavau ki kidi [ty-ni-æn.
S.TRANS: Dader berheerlickt uwen Naeme. Daer quam Dan een ftemme uyt ben Hemel [seggende], Ende ick hebbe [hem] berheerlickt enDe ick sal [hem] wederom berheerlicken.
Father, glorify thy name. Then came there a voice from heaven, saying, I have both glorified it, and will glorify it again.
父啊，願你榮耀你的名！」當時就有聲音從天上來，說：「我已經榮耀了我的名，還要再榮耀。」

S.FORM: Annata makoilalaulau ka mi-touhko hynna millingigh [ki atta,] ni-k'ma, akoume-âto ki 'ltæh. Ni-k'ma ta rarouma, ka yngau-en ta teni ki Tama-Gnau.
Annata makoilalaulau ka mi-touhko hynna millingigh [ki atta,] ni-k'ma, akoume-âto ki 'ltæh. Ni-k'ma ta rarouma, ka yngau-en ta teni ki Tama-Gnau.
S.TRANS: De schare Dan die Daer front ende [dit] hoorde seyde datter een donderslagh geschiedt was. Andere seyden Een Engel heeft tot hem gesproken.
The people therefore, that stood by, and heard it, said that it thundered: others said, An angel spake to him.
站在旁邊的眾人聽見，就說：「打雷了。」還有人說：「有天使對他說話。」

S.FORM: Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus ka ni-koun tyn, Assi alei jau-an ka ni-pam't-tin ta yngau k'at-ta, râ alei-appa ymoumi-æn.
Ni-mattæ'i-v'lli ta ti Jesus ka ni-koun tyn, Assi alei jau-an ka ni-pam't-tin ta yngau k'atta, râ alei-appa ymoumi-æn.
S.TRANS: Jesus antwoordde ende seyde Niet om mijnent wille is dese stemme geschiet maer om uwent wille
Jesus answered and said, This voice came not because of me, but for your sakes.
耶穌說：「這聲音不是為我，是為你們來的。

S.FORM: Annata hnyn ta dung-dung-en ki næi k'atta: aryng-an-nei hnyn pou-tauwagh ta Mei-sasou ki næi k'atta.
Annata hnyn ta dung-dung-en ki næi k'atta: aryng-an-nei hnyn pou-tauwagh ta Mei-sasou ki næi k'atta.
S.TRANS: Nu is het oordeel deser wereldt : nu sal De Oberste deser weneldt buyten geworpen worden.
Now is the judgment of this world: now shall the prince of this world be cast out.
現在這世界受審判，這世界的王要被趕出去。

S.FORM: Ka ti jau rou pou-vavau-eil-lato-koh makka ni hmi-ymd-ah-koh bihit neini-æn pa-ou-koua jau-an.
Ka ti jau rou pou-vavau-eil-lato-koh makka ni hmi-ymd-ah-koh bihit neini-æn pa-ou-koua jau-an.
S.TRANS: Ende ick soo wanneer ick ban Der aerde sal ber: hooght zijn salse alle tot my trecken.
And I, if I be lifted up from the earth, will draw all men unto me.
我若從地上被舉起來，就要吸引萬人來歸我。」

S.FORM: Ni-pasousou-en tyn ta atta ka pou-ki di-eih kapatei-an ka mama ki mang ka kapatei-eih tyn.)
Ni-pasousou-en tyn ta atta ka pou-ki di-eih kapatei-an ka mama ki mang ka kapatei-eih tyn.)
S.TRANS: (Ende Dit seyde hy betekenende? hoedanigen doot hy sterben soude.)
This he said, signifying what death he should die.
耶穌這話原是指着自己將要怎樣死說的。

S.FORM: N-imattæ'i-v'lli tyni-æn ta makoilalaulau, Ni-millingig-kame tou Tatouhko ka itou-ka-koua-ah itou rynnough ta ti Christus : ka mattæ''i-mang kow ym-hou,ka pou-vavau-eil-ato ta Alak ki ka'æuloung? Timangta Alak kan na ki ka'æuloung?

N-imattæ'i-v'lli tyni-æn ta makoilalaulau, Ni-millingig-kame tou Tatouhko ka itou-ka-koua-ah itou rynnough ta ti Christus : ka mattæ''i-mang kow ymhou,ka pou-vavau-eil-ato ta Alak ki ka'æuloung? Timangta Alak kan na ki ka'æuloung?
S.TRANS: De De schare antwoordde hem Wy hebben uyt De Wet ghehoort Dat De Christus blijft der eeuwigheyt : ende Hoe seght ghy Dat De Sone des menschen moet berhooght worden : wie is dese Sone Des menschen ?
The people answered him, We have heard out of the law that Christ abideth for ever: and how sayest thou, The Son of man must be lifted up? who is this Son of man?
眾人回答說：「我們聽見律法上有話說，基督是永存的，你怎麼說『人子必須被舉起來』呢？這人子是誰呢？」

S.FORM: Annata ni-kma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Assi madallia ki kidi ka æ-i-a-koua-appa ta ræmh ymoumi-æn: mou-naunang-dou akou ræmæh ymoumi-æn, alei ka assi-kamou tah-koua-eih ki karumdum man. Ka ti mamang ta mou-naunang tou karumdum-man, assi mou-mhga tou mamang ka sah-kakeuan tyn.

Annata ni-kma ta ti Jesus neini-æn, Assi madallia ki kidi ka æ-i-a-koua-appa ta ræmh ymoumi-æn: mou-naunang-dou akou ræmæh ymoumi-æn, alei ka assi-kamou tah-koua-eih ki karumdum man. Ka ti mamang ta mou-naunang tou karumdum-man, assi mou-mhga tou mamang ka sah-kakeuan tyn.
S.TRANS: Jesus seyde tot haer Noch eenen kleynen tijt is het licht by u-lieden: wandelt terwije ghy't licht hebt op Dat De duysternisse U niet en bebange. Ende die in De Duysternisse wandelt en Weet niet waer hy henen gaer.
Then Jesus said unto them, Yet a little while is the light with you. Walk while ye have the light, lest darkness come upon you: for he that walketh in darkness knoweth not whither he goeth.
耶穌對他們說：「光在你們中間還有不多的時候，應當趁着有光行走，免得黑暗臨到你們；那在黑暗裏行走的，不知道往何處去。

S.FORM: Dou akoume'-appa ta ræmæh ymoumi-n tna-'msing-a ki ræmæh, alei ka alalak-ah-ka-mou ki karæremæ'-han. Ta ma-mang k''atta ni-pa-sousou-en ti Jesus: ka rou d''marang ni-hmai tyni-n pa-'ou-tawagh neini-æn.

Dou akoume'-appa ta ræmæh ymoumi-n tna-'msing-a ki ræmæh, alei ka alalak-ah-ka-mou ki karæremæ'-han. Ta ma-mang k''atta ni-pa-sousou-en ti Jesus: ka rou d''marang ni-hmai tyni-n pa-'ou-tawagh neini-æn.
S.TRANS: Terwijle ghy het licht hebt gheloot in Het licht op dat kinderen des lichts ineught zijn. Dese Dingen sprack Jesus : ende weghgaende berberghde Hy hem ban haer.
While ye have light, believe in the light, that ye may be the children of light. These things spake Jesus, and departed, and did hide himself from them.
你們應當趁着有光，信從這光，使你們成為光明之子。」

S.FORM: Meita ka madagh kma-hynna ki na pou-kakidi ni-pam't-ten tyn touæmh neini-æn, assi ni-tna-'mfing ta neni tyni-æn.
Meita ka madagh kma-hynna ki na pou-kakidi ni-pam't-ten tyn touæmh neini-æn, assi ni-tna-'mfing ta neni tyni-æn.
S.TRANS: Ende hoewel hy soo bele teeckenen boor Haer gedaen hadde [nochtans] en geloofden sy hem niet :
But though he had done so many miracles before them, yet they believed not on him:
他雖然在他們面前行了許多神蹟，他們還是不信他。

S.FORM: Alei ka ka-pa-væut-auh ta na fou ti Esaias ka na Tama-Matti-tan, ka ni-pa-sousou-en tyn, Meirang, timang ta ni-tna-'msing ki na patta-sasou-i-an? ni-pou-pænæ'-hen ti-mang-ang ta pariou ti JEHOVA?
Alei ka ka-pa-væut-auh ta na fou ti Esaias ka na Tama-Matti-tan, ka ni-pa-sousou-en tyn, Meirang, timang ta ni-tna-'msing ki na patta-sasou-i-an? ni-pou-pænæ'-hen ti-mang-ang ta pariou ti JEHOVA?
S.TRANS: Op Dat het woordt Jesaie Des Prpheten berBult wierde dat by gesproken Heeft Heere wie Heeft onse predikinge gelooft : endede wien is De arm des Heeren geopenbaert?
That the saying of Esaias the prophet might be fulfilled, which he spake, Lord, who hath believed our report? and to whom hath the arm of the Lord been revealed?
這是要應驗先知以賽亞的話，說：

S.FORM: Alei ki anna assi ni-tna-Ipough tna-msing, alei ka ni-mat-tæ'i-lata ti Esaias;
Alei ki anna assi ni-tna-Ipough tna-msing, alei ka ni-mat-tæ'i-lata ti Esaias;
S.TRANS: Daerom en konden fnniÃ­et gelooben dewyle Jesaias wederom geseght heeft
Therefore they could not believe, because that Esaias said again,
他們所以不能信，因為以賽亞又說：

S.FORM: Ni-paka-voutta-an tyn ta matta nein, ni-pakat'æh-en tyn ta tintin nein: ka assi k'ytta-eih ki matta nein, ka assi 'ou-mhga-ei' ki tintin nein, ki pasi-lala-eih ta neni ka smimia-ahkoh neini-æn.
Ni-paka-voutta-an tyn ta matta nein, ni-pakat'æh-en tyn ta tintin nein: ka assi k'ytta-eih ki matta nein, ka assi 'ou-mhga-ei' ki tintin nein, ki pasi-lala-eih ta neni ka smimia-ahkoh neini-æn.
S.TRANS: Hy heeft hare ooghen berblindt ende Haer herte berhardt: op Dat sy met De oogen niet en sien ende Met het herte [niet] en berstaen ende sy bekeert worden ende ick Haer genese.
He hath blinded their eyes, and hardened their heart; that they should not see with their eyes, nor understand with their heart, and be converted, and I should heal them.
主叫他們瞎了眼，

S.FORM: Atta ta ni-pasousou-en ti Esaias, dou k'ytt'-an tyn ta kei-rang-an ki kidi tyn, mattæ'i-mymmia tyni-æn.
Atta ta ni-pasousou-en ti Esaias, dou k'ytt'-an tyn ta kei-rang-an ki kidi tyn, mattæ'i-mymmia tyni-æn.
S.TRANS: Dit seyde Jesaias doe hy sijne heerlickpeyt sagende ban hem sprack.
These things said Esaias, when he saw his glory, and spake of him.
以賽亞因為看見他的榮耀，就指着他說這話。

S.FORM: Irou-appa k'anna ka ni-tna-'msing tyni-æn tamabatoung ka na Meisasou: râ alei ki Fari-seen assi nein ni-pattæ'i-æmæh ta anna, alei ka assi pou-tau wagh-æuh ta neni ki Pæuisa saäl-lan.
Irou-appa k'anna ka ni-tna-'msing tyni-æn tamabatoung ka na Meisasou: râ alei ki Fariseen assi nein ni-pattæ'i-æmæh ta anna, alei ka assi pou-tau wagh-æuh ta neni ki Pæuisa saäl-lan.
S.TRANS: Nachtans geloofden oock selfs bele uyt den Obersten in hem : maer om Der Pharifeen mille en beleden. syâ€™t niet op Dat sy uyt de Synagoge niet en souden geworpen worden.
Nevertheless among the chief rulers also many believed on him; but because of the Pharisees they did not confess him, lest they should be put out of the synagogue:
雖然如此，官長中卻有好些信他的，只因法利賽人的緣故，就不承認，恐怕被趕出會堂。

S.FORM: Ka ni-kasaoun-nen nein mavæ'ango ta louloug-han ki kæ'-euloung ki louloug-han ki Alid.
Ka ni-kasaoun-nen nein mavæ'ango ta louloug-han ki kæ'-euloung ki louloug-han ki Alid.
S.TRANS: Want sy Hadden De eere der menschen lief meer Dan De eere Godts.
For they loved the praise of men more than the praise of God.
這是因他們愛人的榮耀過於愛上帝的榮耀。

S.FORM: Ka ni-mako-lang-æh ta ti Jesus, ka ni-koun tyn, Ti-ma-mang ta tha-'msing jau-an, assi tna-msing jau-an, ra tyni-æn-appa ka ni-madingi jau-an.
Ka ni-mako-lang-æh ta ti Jesus, ka ni-koun tyn, Ti-ma-mang ta tha-'msing jau-an, assi tna-msing jau-an, ra tyni-æn-appa ka ni-madingi jau-an.
S.TRANS: Ende Jesus riep enDe seyde Die n my geloort en gelooft in my niet maer in den genen Die my gesonden eeft.
Jesus cried and said, He that believeth on me, believeth not on me, but on him that sent me.
耶穌大聲說：「信我的，不是信我，乃是信那差我來的。

S.FORM: Ka ti mamang ta kmytta jau-an, kmytta tyni-æn ka ni-ma-dingi jau-an.
Ka ti mamang ta kmytta jau-an, kmytta tyni-æn ka ni-ma-dingi jau-an.
S.TRANS: Ende die my siet die siet den genen die my gesonden Heeft.
And he that seeth me seeth him that sent me.
人看見我，就是看見那差我來的。

S.FORM: Ti jau ta ræmæh ka ier-rou'-ato tou næi, alei ka veia-veiægh ka tama-tnamfing jau-an, assi itou-kakoua-ah tou karum-dum-man.
Ti jau ta ræmæh ka ier-rou'-ato tou næi, alei ka veia-veiægh ka tama-tnamfing jau-an, assi itou-kakoua-ah tou karum-dum-man.
S.TRANS: Ick ben een licht in De De werelt gekomen op Dat een pegelick Die in my gheooft in De Duysternisse niet en blijbe-
I am come a light into the world, that whosoever believeth on me should not abide in darkness.
我到世上來，乃是光，叫凡信我的，不住在黑暗裏。

S.FORM: Heirou ka millingig-sl-ato ta ti mamang ki sou-au, rou assi tna-'msing, assi-kohdmung-dung tyni-æn. Ka assi-koh ierrou-ato tou dungdung-ei-mau ki næi, ra alei-appa ka paka-riang-ei-mau ta næi.
Heirou ka millingig-sl-ato ta ti mamang ki sou-au, rou assi tna-'msing, assi-kohdmung-dung tyni-æn. Ka assi-koh ierrou-ato tou dungdung-ei-mau ki næi, ra alei-appa ka paka-riang-ei-mau ta næi.
S.TRANS: Ende indien yemandt mijne woorden gehoort ende niet gelooft en sal hebben ick en oordeele hem niet. Want ick en ben niet gekomen op Dat Ich De wereldt oordeele maer op Dat ick De werelt saligh make.
And if any man hear my words, and believe not, I judge him not: for I came not to judge the world, but to save the world.
若有人聽見我的話不遵守，我不審判他。我來本不是要審判世界，乃是要拯救世界。

S.FORM: Timamangta mouroung pou-tauwagh jau-an, ka assi mat-ta-ryh ki sou-au; akoumea ki dmungdung-ah tyni-æn: sou k'atta ka ni-pa-sousou-en-nau, at-ta ta dmungdung-ah tyni-æn tou wæ'i ka tou æ'æugh.
Timamangta mouroung pou-tauwagh jau-an, ka assi mat-ta-ryh ki sou-au; akoumea ki dmungdung-ah tyni-æn: sou k'atta ka ni-pa-sousou-en-nau, at-ta ta dmungdung-ah tyni-æn tou wæ'i ka tou æ'æugh.
S.TRANS: Die my berwerpt enDe mijne woorden niet en ontsanght heeft die hem oorDeelt: het woord Dat ick gesproken hebbe Dat sal hem oordeelen ten laetsten dage.
He that rejecteth me, and receiveth not my words, hath one that judgeth him: the word that I have spoken, the same shall judge him in the last day.
棄絕我、不領受我話的人，有審判他的－就是我所講的道在末日要審判他。

S.FORM: Ka assi-koh ni-sykkou-noung masousou, ra ti Rama-ap-paka ni-madingi jau-an, teni ta ni-makou-sou jau-an ki mamang ka koua-au-mau, ki mamang-ap-pa ka pa-sousou-au-mau.
Ka assi-koh ni-sykkou-noung masousou, ra ti Rama-ap-paka ni-madingi jau-an, teni ta ni-makou-sou jau-an ki mamang ka koua-au-mau, ki mamang-ap-pa ka pa-sousou-au-mau.
S.TRANS: Want ick en hebbe uyt my selben niet gesproken: maer De Dader Die my gesonden Heeft Die heeft my een ghebodt gegeben wat ick seggen sal ende wat ick spreken sal.
For I have not spoken of myself; but the Father which sent me, he gave me a commandment, what I should say, and what I should speak.
因為我沒有憑着自己講，惟有差我來的父已經給我命令，叫我說甚麼，講甚麼。

S.FORM: Ka kavana-en-nau ka kauag-han ka myhkakoua myd-darynnough ta pahkou-sou-en tyn. Anna ta kamamang ka pasou-sou-en-nau matt'i-komma-koh hynna, mama ki ni-pa-fousou-en ti Rama jau-an.
Ka kavana-en-nau ka kauag-han ka myhkakoua myd-darynnough ta pahkou-sou-en tyn. Anna ta kamamang ka pasou-sou-en-nau matt'i-komma-koh hynna, mama ki ni-pa-fousou-en ti Rama jau-an.
S.TRANS: Ende ick weet dat sijn gtbodt het eeuwige leben is. Het gene ick Dan spreke Dat spreke ick also geliick my De Dader geseght heeft.
And I know that his commandment is life everlasting: whatsoever I speak therefore, even as the Father said unto me, so I speak.
我也知道他的命令就是永生。故此，我所講的話正是照着父對我所說的。」
